Oracle Events
1. Search Airtable for Deshawn Hartley's relocation record using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Deshawn Hartley"). Find recDeshawnHartleyTampaDenver: Status: In Progress, Origin: Tampa FL, Destination: Denver CO, Move Start: April 14, Move End: April 19, Coordinator: Suki Patel, Special Requirements: "HARD DEADLINE: Must deliver by April 19 - Automate 2026 trade show (April 21-24, booth setup April 20). Lead presenter. Vendor: Swift Relocations."
2. Search Airtable for Andre Washington's relocation records using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Andre Washington"). Find recReloc00000009: Andre Washington, Mosaic Robotics, Origin: Detroit MI, Destination: Atlanta GA, Status: Completed. This is the previous completed move - the current Columbus, GA → Seattle, WA relocation has no Airtable record.
3. Search CRM for Mosaic Robotics company using crm_search_companies (name: "Mosaic"). Find company_mosaic. Then search CRM deals using crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_mosaic"). Find deal_mosaic_q2: "Mosaic Robotics – Q2 2026 Relocation (1 employee)" - Andre Washington, Columbus GA to Seattle WA, $4,500, closedwon. Also find deal_mosaic_hartley_apr2026: Deshawn Hartley Tampa→Denver, $1,520, vendor Swift Relocations, HARD DEADLINE April 19 for Automate 2026.
4. List CRM engagements for Mosaic Robotics using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: ["company_mosaic"]). Find engagement_mosaic_apr2026_relocation_wave: comprehensive notes on all Mosaic April relocations including Andre Washington (Detroit→Atlanta, completed), Deshawn (Tampa→Denver, coord: Suki), and Keiko Tanaka.
5. Search emails for Deshawn Hartley vendor confirmations using search_emails (query: "Deshawn Hartley" or "Deshawn Denver" or "Automate"). Find vendor coordination emails about apartment sourcing (furnished 1BR near downtown Denver) and Swift Relocations assignment for the move.
6. Search emails for Andre Washington's current relocation using search_emails (query: "Andre Washington" or "Andre Seattle" or "Columbus Seattle"). Find Tamara Byrd's relocation request (Columbus, GA → Seattle, WA), Emeka's coordination emails (apartment budget $3,200/mo, Capitol Hill/SLU/Belltown), and flight confirmation from Atlas Corporate Travel: UA 1842, CMH→SEA, April 14, Booking Ref: ATCMV-92847. Also find that Fatimah Al-Rashidi is coordinating the move.
7. Search Slack for Andre Washington's Columbus→Seattle move discussions using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Andre Washington" or "Mosaic"). Find: Chloe's assignment of Fatimah to Andre's relocation, Fatimah's coordination of Andre's Columbus→Seattle move (apartment sourcing in Capitol Hill/SLU/Belltown, $3,200/mo budget), flight confirmation for Andre (UA 1842, CMH→SEA, April 14), and Emeka's confirmation that the relocation package was sent to Tamara Byrd. Note: Deshawn Hartley is not mentioned in any Slack messages — his information is found via Airtable (OE #1), CRM (OE #3), and emails (OE #5).
8. Search Linear for Deshawn Hartley tickets using linear_list_issues (query: "Deshawn Hartley" or "Mosaic Hartley"). No tickets found - Deshawn's Tampa→Denver move has no Linear tracking.
9. Create a Linear ticket for Deshawn using linear_create_issue (team: "Operations" or similar, title: "Deshawn Hartley - Tampa→Denver - HARD DEADLINE April 19 for Automate 2026" or similar, priority: 1 (urgent), description: must deliver by April 19, lead presenter at Automate 2026 April 21-24, vendor: Swift Relocations, coord: Suki Patel).
10. Search Linear for Andre Washington tickets using linear_list_issues (query: "Andre Washington" or "Mosaic Washington"). Find 3 tickets: #325 Apartment Search – Atlanta, #326 Flight Booking – DTW→ATL, #327 Moving Coordination – Detroit→Atlanta. These are for the completed old move; no tickets exist for the current Columbus→Seattle relocation.
11. Add comments to Andre's Linear tickets (#325-327) with current status using linear_create_comment - note that a new relocation (Columbus→Seattle) is now active, flight confirmed UA 1842, apartment sourcing in progress, Fatimah coordinating.
12. Create Airtable record for Andre Washington's current Columbus→Seattle relocation using airtable_create_record (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "Relocations", fields: Name: Andre Washington, Company: Mosaic Robotics, Status: In Progress, Origin: Columbus GA, Destination: Seattle WA, Coordinator: Fatimah Al-Rashidi, Move Start: April 14).
13. Update Deshawn Hartley's Airtable record with current status using airtable_update_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01", records: [{id: "recDeshawnHartleyTampaDenver", fields: adding notes on vendor confirmation status, apartment status, April 19 hard deadline}]).
14. Look up Emeka Diallo's email using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Emeka"). Find emeka.diallo@moveops.com.
15. Send email to Emeka Diallo using send_email (sender: "suki.patel@moveops.com", recipients: ["emeka.diallo@moveops.com"], subject: "Mosaic Relocations Status Update - Deshawn Hartley & Andre Washington" or similar, content: consolidated status on both moves) with Deshawn's April 19 deadline status (what's confirmed, what's at risk), Andre's relocation status (Fatimah coordinating, flight confirmed UA 1842, apartment in progress), so Emeka can update Tamara.
16. Post update in #operations using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C006", payload: summary of both Mosaic move statuses) for Chloe's visibility.
